once you leave you can never return i worked for tcs for nearly 8 years and went from making 72k year to 91k year at a senior level i should have been making far more the pay is sub par as a senior software engineer i made under 100k year

i've had a challenging experience working at tcs and there are several key areas that have contributed to my dissatisfaction with the company communication one of the biggest issues i've encountered is the poor communication within the organization it was often difficult to find the right person to reach out to for help or guidance which made navigating the company frustrating my manager rarely communicated with me...
not anything in particular other than travel policies
